hero.title: Who We Are
hero.subtitle: 5 years of experience, hundreds of satisfied customers

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: Balconix was founded in 2021 as part of ILSO GROUP with a simple mission: to provide high-quality balcony glazing solutions at affordable prices for Georgian families.
story.paragraph2: Over the past 5 years, we've completed over 500 projects across Georgia, from Tbilisi to Batumi, transforming ordinary balconies into beautiful, functional living spaces.
story.paragraph3: Our team of skilled professionals combines modern European materials with expert craftsmanship to deliver results that exceed expectations. We're proud to be Georgia's trusted choice for balcony glazing.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our services

q1.question: How long does installation take?
q1.answer: Typical installation takes 3-5 working days depending on the balcony size and system type.

q2.question: What materials do you use?
q2.answer: We use premium imported PVC and aluminum profiles with single or double glazed glass, all certified to European standards.

q3.question: Is measurement really free?
q3.answer: Yes, we provide completely free measurement and consultation with no obligation.

q4.question: What is the warranty period?
q4.answer: All our installations come with a 5-year warranty covering both materials and workmanship.

q5.question: How much does balcony glazing cost?
q5.answer: Pricing depends on size, system type, and glass options. Use our calculator for an estimate or contact us for a detailed quote.

q6.question: Do you work in all regions of Georgia?
q6.answer: Yes, we provide services throughout Georgia, including Tbilisi, Batumi, and other cities.

q7.question: What is the difference between single and double glazing?
q7.answer: Double glazing provides better thermal and sound insulation. It's recommended for year-round comfort.

q8.question: Can I make partial payment?
q8.answer: Yes, we offer flexible payment options including partial payment plans.
